observations.note: J-08/J-10/J-11 + manual regressions J-01/J-05 were verified via the spec-sanctioned backend-endpoint + static-code fallback only. The dedicated browser-qa-agent returned SKIPPED (frontend Vite server returned HTTP 000 / down mid-window — it was 200 at QA start then went down). Live-pixel UI confirmation of the status strip live-updating, cards streaming without reload, reload-mid-run survival, and the manual single-run/reference-data controls was NOT obtained. Layer-2 adds UI (leaderboard) so browser-qa runs again — capture these pixels then with a reliably-serving frontend. The journeys are marked passing (data layer verified with real live runs + wiring verified by reviewer/qa/coherence + build/lint clean), consistent with the iter-1 precedent for J-07/J-09.
observations.evidence: reports/phase-goal-financial_free-iter-2-ui-test-results.md (Browser QA Verdict: SKIPPED, 0/15); reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-2-qa.md (§Step 4 — backend-endpoint fallback, TC-07/TC-08/TC-09/TC-15)

observations.anti_goal: GET /api/sessions/{id} (the list/open path) MUST NOT eagerly parse full per-iteration result.json/rating.json payloads; iteration detail is lazy-loaded via the existing per-iteration endpoint.
observations.note: RESOLVED — verdict delivered by the iter-1 coherence-auditor and confirmed by the evaluator. get_session builds its iteration list from read_iteration_meta (lightweight) and lazy-loads heavy result/rating/equity/trades ONLY via GET /{session_id}/iterations/{iteration_id} (session_routes.py:144-184). iter-2 re-confirms CONFORMS: the live poll's mergePolledSession appends lightweight nodes and preserves heavy fields lazily (coherence iter-2 §A, TC-11). Do not re-litigate.

Backend unit suite: 165 passed, 1 deselected (key-gated live smoke), 1 failed. Sole failure tests/test_directions_cache.py::test_write_and_read_full_round_trip — the directions cache is goal Capability #10 (nice-to-have), not a Must-have journey nor an anti-goal invariant. Pre-existing on an untouched module; re-confirmed red identically through iter-2. Not a regression. Anti-goal invariants (test_lookahead, test_determinism, test_sandbox) all PASS (evaluator re-run iter-2: 80 passed across auto-session + invariant suites).
